channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CNN analyst and 'The Morning Show' producer says Stephen Colbert is a role model for his 'positive' outlook on his show ending
item.description: Journalist and TV producer Brian Stelter says leaders like outgoing The Late Show host Stephen Colbert embody the attitude everyone needs in their...

item.title: CEO of AI-powered performance review firm says annual evaluations weren't designed for the AI era: 'The practice just hasn't kept up'
item.description: 15Five CEO David Hassell told Fortune that companies must stop relying on the annual performance review cadence.

item.title: The times they are a-changin': Washington suddenly warms to regulating AI
item.description: With a public backlash against AI mounting, the White House is changing its stance on AI regulation and talks with China on AI.

item.title: WeWork and Upwork CEOs confirm Gen Z hiring challenges are real but not unprecedented
item.description: WeWork CEO John Santora says older generations should mentor entry-level workers.
